description: This pipeline processes incoming images by applying various operations, including calibration and annotation-based grouping, to ultimately export the results in a non-native format, while also generating an overlay output and a compartment output, allowing for further analysis and visualization of the processed data.

fbd51b8a-22f3-4021-9471-a07b3f8ddfdd.name: iji-export-image-v2
fbd51b8a-22f3-4021-9471-a07b3f8ddfdd.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

124b925b-54e4-4a7d-bd81-229e00662043.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
124b925b-54e4-4a7d-bd81-229e00662043.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

714f1d72-e573-4ffc-9108-d9d5b934d32e.name: iji-export-image-v2
714f1d72-e573-4ffc-9108-d9d5b934d32e.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

c01b7d9f-5be2-4aee-a1f7-4a3bc7f07c15.name: ij1-calibration-draw-scale-bar
c01b7d9f-5be2-4aee-a1f7-4a3bc7f07c15.description: Draws a scale bar onto the image (via an overlay ROI)
